content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 — Review notes / demo account quality WARN — demo credentials are real (`demo_user.txt`, `demo_password.txt`), but `review_information/notes.txt` reads only "n/a" while the app is login-gated (`LoginView.swift:12` SecureField) and has a subscription paywall (`PaywallView.swift`).
Pierre: Apple's reviewer needs to reach core features like the paywall-gated app-blocking, schedules, and reports — a bare "n/a" gives no guidance on how to trigger or test the subscription flow. The credentials look usable, but without notes the reviewer may not know FocusShield Premium is required for the main functionality and could reject under 2.1. Add steps explaining how to log in and reach/test the blocking features (and how to exercise the paywall in sandbox).
